75951.subject: 25 AI Prompts That Actually Work
75951.body:
The AI Evolution Newsletter

Автор: AI Evolution


Автор: AI Evolution

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/25-ai-prompts-actually-work-ai-evolution-1k0yc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BTKtbwWnASc6JuCVQNXnWlA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=0R2-Pyb4pyJsk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrkzzvvc~4c-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrkzzvvc-4c
  
Most people use AI wrong for content. They copy-paste a prompt, get generic output, then spend 30 minutes editing it to not sound like AI. We've been testing prompts for months. Kept the ones that actually work. 25 of them. 5 categories: LinkedIn posts, emails, landing pages, content repurposing, and research. Each one includes the exact prompt, why it works, a real example, and variations to test. No fluff. No filler. Just the prompts we actually use. Grab it free: https://www.chasedimond.com/25-ai-prompts-that-actually-work
Приєднатися до обговорення
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/25-ai-prompts-actually-work-ai-evolution-1k0yc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BTKtbwWnASc6JuCVQNXnWlA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=0R2-Pyb4pyJsk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_-null-fz96fz~mrkzzvvc~4c-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrkzzvvc-4c
  
      

----------------------------------------

Це повідомлення е-поштою адресовано учасникові Oleh Novosadov (I am 36 years old, and I am passionate about the world of cryptocurrencies and blockchain technologies. My professional interests include investing in cryptocurrencies, exploring blockchain, Web3, and the DeFi sector.)
Дізнатися, чому ми включили цю інформацію https://www.linkedin.com/help/linkedin/answer/4788?lang=uk&lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BTKtbwWnASc6JuCVQNXnWlA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=0R2-Pyb4pyJsk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-SecurityHelp-0-textfooterglimmer&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-SecurityHelp-0-textfooterglimmer-null-fz96fz~mrkzzvvc~4c-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrkzzvvc-4c
Ви отримуєте сповіщення е-поштою від LinkedIn. Інші бачитимуть, що ви є підписником.


Скасувати підписку https://www.linkedin.com/series-notifications/?action=unsubscribe&memberToken=ADoAADmXJ98BlqNfDlPIQsT8i8GBT4eiyg7PkZE&newsletterId=7062099004213391360&newsletterTitle=The AI Evolution Newsletter&lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BTKtbwWnASc6JuCVQNXnWlA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=0R2-Pyb4pyJsk1&ek=email_series_follow_newsletter_02&e=fz96fz-mrkzzvvc-4c&eid=fz96fz-mrkzzvvc-4c&m=unsubscribe&ts=footerGlimmer&

75950.subject: 🔷 The Daily: UK defers crypto tax on DeFi lending
75950.body:
US government moves over $288 million in seized bitcoin, ether to Coinbase Prime: Arkham | US banking groups urge Senate to strengthen stablecoin provisions in Clarity Act | CleanSpark signs $6.6 billion, 20-year data center lease with unnamed global tech firm | European Central Bank taps 36 payment providers for digital euro pilot |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by James Hunt | Edited by Daniel Kuhn

Happy Tuesday! *Bitcoin* gained after a softer-than-expected U.S. inflation print, with analysts ( https://www.theblock.co/post/408263/soft-print-hard-regime-bitcoin-climbs-64000-june-cpi-falls-largest-monthly-drop-since-2020?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) at *Sygnum* , *21Shares* , and *Wintermute* pointing to easing rate-hike expectations, improving liquidity conditions, and a possible break above $66,000.

In today's newsletter, *HMRC* adopts "no gain, no loss" tax treatment for crypto lending, *U.S. government-linked wallets* move millions of dollars in seized crypto to *Coinbase Prime* , *U.S. banking groups* urge the *Senate* to strengthen the *Clarity Act's* stablecoin provisions, and more.

Meanwhile, decentralized AI project *Nous Research* is reportedly in talks to raise ( https://www.theblock.co/post/408237/decentralized-ai-project-nous-research-in-talks-to-raise-75m-at-1-5b-valuation-report?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) $75 million at a $1.5 billion valuation.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read — and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*🇬🇧 UK HMRC adopts 'no gain, no loss' tax treatment for crypto lending, liquidity pools*

( https://www.theblock.co/post/408206/uk-hmrc-adopts-no-gain-no-loss-tax-treatment-for-crypto-lending-liquidity-pools?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

The UK's *HM Revenue & Customs* will treat certain crypto lending and liquidity pool disposals as "no gain, no loss," deferring Capital Gains Tax until users make an economic disposal of the underlying crypto.

* The measure takes effect April 6, 2027, and is expected to affect around 700,000 individuals who use crypto loan and liquidity pool arrangements.
* The rules cover three scenarios: lending arrangements swapped for the same type of crypto; borrowing arrangements, where borrowed crypto is valued at market rate and collateral is disregarded; and liquidity pool entries via automated market makers.
* Any difference

A decade of redefining money — and a personalized look back at your onchain life.

View in browser (https://newsletter.consensys.io/e3t/Ctc/T8+113/czspy04/VVGQ--4zLLPTW30Vv2H1KJjB5W2dmkKk5RtC2BN2dmMxg5m_5PW7Y9pgv6lZ3m1W5KkRMz2c9QyzW5TXV3j3hd4rJW6XL4dN1LHxslW7FFmv-817JlJW4yRVRN2YVz5MW74LFMH8mFbscW1Pc9ZB5nW-mnW7XBmqf7s395kW66cV4M6C3gdpW2DFvTh2j2ty6W6r-plW5LJVTMW3TJ27b2YvnJdW2HBcM86-cmWVW42P9Qn6-xzxJW48szQX4QWVVBW3q-f1q669g7bVTd-Nc8XHmrTW7YTb8c3MYFmXW1NHDZY5j5h13W50whk94fJfwPW8HLpx-2WM-ZYW1FdnhM7XzSP1W4Nz7q-18X-nwW3kZfQD67Hm3sW6nMd1s63MjDmN72y0HhZ424sW37hq5H5fNbVbW1L35M17Y0CJzW6s6ZCh4WWH_dW5Xy-Gr17Bhh0W1v2b848jdc6NW5rDXWb8PFTXmW4Rt_w05Y5Q8VW3WLJY17NNYhHW74Hy9L7dFKSVW27mRSs2khnpxW3xC6329hcbZwW4qzZ4z4G0cbmW7CbsnS5CC1x8W5gPXp73LxfMbW428GkQ6trj_VW73F1mn3c7pW5f6Vpmzs04 )

MetaMask (https://newsletter.consensys.io/e3t/Ctc/T8+113/czspy04/VVGQ--4zLLPTW30Vv2H1KJjB5W2dmkKk5RtC2BN2dmMwH3prCCW6N1vHY6lZ3l5W2VStbT8pXP50W63FKYK3ddMtFW72Qy6t5TrB-gW4R55pc13pwH-W4DHBkj26GYQqW64NrVm3mpDC8N8pcLvyN_XKvW8_Qy6p7GCB6MN3dlR6-_xhsRN5JgyZbXtDrPW5kb0xj1HbwkvW70bm8F4xTXSlN7gZWBywH6lwW3_Lz7H8ycwWdW6tjyzR1YCd4qV-6_J43kw0GnW2LWMyp2bPBQVN6BF3pt_0NyfW3x1RzD2l6-1tW79sYkX93VLTSW39Wts83jN_qWW1WnSTM2-NczPf5jF7bs04 )

A decade of MetaMask

On July 14, 2016, MetaMask went live: one small browser extension, built on the bet that people should be able to hold and use their money directly. 

Ten years later: Millions of downloads, used in nearly every country on Earth, trillions of dollars moved. Every transaction signed by someone like you. 

We didn't get here alone. Whether you joined in the ICO days, DeFi Summer, the NFT boom, or last week, this milestone is yours too. 

So we made a little something for you: a tour of your history onchain, alongside ours. Just open up MetaMask to try it out. (Best experienced on mobile.)

See your life onchain
(https://newsletter.consensys.io/e3t/Ctc/T8+113/czspy04/VVGQ--4zLLPTW30Vv2H1KJjB5W2dmkKk5RtC2BN2dmMwn3gP0xW69sMD-6lZ3m9W4QRvtF6fC7tTVLWPzm466gtvW40sL3Q8VzYV7W3bSCTg4zfzG3W97VglV4cj750W49MW8l7G7Qj5W5fRJDj24RBrWW6FKpst2sJZZ9W293pfv52JdWdW8kqkZK7b-kGZW5wxfRg8sWgb_W394SFb9fz4H5W8LVW_j10qxMgN2tkqnc5HpBzV43vrs8YxpZzW8hP1D_7PwYsnW2XPdT38swQ8HN36wR_D8ltlmW7GNfsB9dn3clW2zQDmZ3DKtc7f7JpZh204 )

See your life onchain
(https://newsletter.consensys.io/e3t/Ctc/T8+113/czspy04/VVGQ--4zLLPTW30Vv2H1KJjB5W2dmkKk5RtC2BN2dmMwn5fkwKW69t95C6lZ3pDW5Qh5Pz2gMZVwN5G_GzsWrT13Vrsmlc4HNjyZW5v18B37hK5b9W7jQF-L5bhwc_W2D5x4P1hqd_QVM-4vB7PWjVYW63JMFP52Bj_cW6JM-tS9c9GGKW7v4TG21Vq5rMW1tDp-X5xBZ14W4tSMR-67rD0YW2p8BJr5w1tFlW6C-BHk6KGZ--VTc6pb5nHQq1W98PgHb8zpJ0lW2DZcnx5J2ZPzW1GRQyB7FY844W8YgKMt1VwFfkW8_ccRq36zHPPVWvzGN4ttHs5W62CX-h3BGPH9W5ZddKJ8vk3N3N2LVg3TR0pJ9W4Y2GzV6xJ_tSW4Nlx_h354VS1W1xSDHH8VSXMqW6t7qVM8PhkdpW2dFthY45GnJlW6zV6jY4BFS7KW5KRvs_8BV-GvW6DQSXp2bgrlHN63QBfpTMhhHW47xtRS19cV0HW8SJPKF1mDFKwN7wPPgb9GZrvf2HrXw204 )

Your last 10 years, onchain 🦊

75945.subject: Trump has no good options for reopening Hormuz
75945.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mzd9AAcAAAAAA_p2Zt24UplVtX3zjahkHQdaqO2g5-5JvaIRHMEbYkVsmo9zYvR824BUHtNiik880HeCSxqpcyFcWXtE10K26UofdRieBxkjSL5_VZMMJHTE 

July 14th 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist Today

 Our best journalism, handpicked each day


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mzd9AAcAAAAAA_p2Zt25BAJa1bPXtogt41zQ_VERPTAqsGAATsSNLXPY1MjrzTwCnxlTBMfSBaw7_S8ogPovETtQ_AF0dKUzL4zbnU8nDKZj_bI9jfXuAIdM 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mzd9AAcAAAAAA_p2Zt26dK4EIBV4s3YKlnGqGvIy6K6wwzqzWKBM5Oi1oSSxWz3MdagOj4WbIKpNMIjM0QSNZ2f0lij5PKBY1CP2_By0kl2KutyWD9f2LGYc 


 


 
 

Brooke Unger

Senior digital editor



 Missiles and drones are flying in the Middle East and the Strait of Hormuz is closed once again. Oil prices have jumped. But neither Iran nor America is gaining an upper hand from the resumption of conflict and both are suffering (as is the rest of the world). Our analysis shows why the least-bad option for both sides is the truce they are 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mzd9AAcAAAAAA_p2Zt27eEs8zVENFUycFhTrvGhDNbGiT4Ye7_xRgiK91A1m3ci06vSAorxDTDn5Yhpq7D4cJk8WoEevQVuk2Ejqeoewm-SaCa1onR0 
shooting to bits .
 


 How do you ensure that artificial intelligence will benefit humanity rather than doom it? Sir Demis Hassabis, a co-founder of Google DeepMind, has an interesting plan. He lays it out 
 
https://click.e.

75944.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest — July 14
75944.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi


Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-july-14-oleh-bezuhlyi-4exjf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BKR2zqEmTTEaesa3Hv7eudQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3BdYJMiILaJck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrkullev~l-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrkullev-l
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Washington is where the action is. With the CLARITY Act clock ticking and Circle winning a federal trust charter, the plumbing of regulated crypto is being poured — even as prices stay pinned by war headlines. 🏛️ CLARITY Act Enters Its Make-or-Break Senate Week The Senate returned with roughly four weeks before the August recess to move the Digital Asset Market Clarity Act, the market-structure bill that would finally split SEC and CFTC jurisdiction over digital assets. Senator Lummis is pushing for floor time, President Trump has publicly urged passage, and a reduced GOP majority makes the math tight. Odds are being handicapped near a coin flip. Read full story 🏦 Circle Wins OCC Approval for a National Trust Bank Circle secured the OCC's nod to operate a national trust bank, placing USDC reserves and custody under direct federal oversight. It is the clearest sign yet that stablecoin issuers are being absorbed into the regulated banking perimeter rather than kept outside it — and a template rivals will now have to match. More details ⚖️ SEC Signals a Formal "Regulation Crypto" Rulebook A rulemaking package framed as "Regulation Crypto" suggests Chair Paul Atkins' SEC is moving from case-by-case enforcement toward a written digital-asset framework. For firms that spent years guessing at the rules, a codified rulebook would be the most consequential shift in agency posture since the ETF approvals. Read more 🏢 Wall Street Transfer Agents Warn SEC Over Third-Party Tokens The Securities Transfer Association lobbied the SEC to argue that third-party tokenized versions of equities threaten market integrity, and that only company-authorized tokenization should get preferential treatment under future rules. It is the incumbent record-keepers drawing a line against the tokenized-stock boom. See details 🥇 Tether Puts Its $20B Gold Hoard to Work in Lending Tether plans to deploy a gold stockpile rivaling a top-20 sovereign reserve into lending. The issuer already carries roughly $141 billion of direct and indirect Treasury exposure and booked over $1 billion in Q1 profit — turning the world's largest stablecoin operator into something that increasingly resembles a shadow central bank. Read full story 💵 Stablecoins Move Record Volume as the Float Shrinks Adjusted stablecoin transaction volume hit a record $1.79 tri

75942.subject: Robinhood Chain launched and the numbers are astounding
75942.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/c2549d42-c592-4e6b-82e8-409bebea29d3/Top_banner.jpg?t=1783431744) [Brought to you by Boardwalk]
Follow image link: (https://defillama.com/research/report/boardwalk-closing-the-gap-between-token-launches-token-economies)
Caption: 

Welcome to the DefiLlama Newsletter. Each week we bring you the most valuable onchain insights from the the deepest DeFi dataset in the world.



Subscribe (https://newsletter.defillama.com)



## Robinhood Chain takes off

Robinhood Chain’s mainnet launch has been a blockbuster. Here’s the snapshot:

* $160m TVL

* $325m in stablecoins

* $12m in RWAs

* $10m → $800m daily DEX volume ($4.6b cumulative)

* Over [500k addresses hold ETH](https://defillama.com/pro/eth-distribution-on-robinhood-s8l839) on Robinhood Chain

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/a5a5ab4a-6166-439c-8dec-ec20e044ff12/robinhood-chain_2026-07-14.png?t=1784036733)
Follow image link: (https://defillama.com/chain/robinhood-chain)
Caption: 

TVL on Robinhood Chain has grown by at least $10m most days, with a particularly strong inflow day today.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/f0e58e1f-c118-4a9a-95e5-0ddd87c9460f/robinhood-chain-daily-tvl-growth_2026-07-14.png?t=1784042407)
Caption: 

Morpho and Uniswap dominate TVL, combining for 96% of all locked value.

View Robinhood Chain Protocol Rankings (https://defillama.com/chain/robinhood-chain)

Chain activity pushed Robinhood up to the top 5 chains in 7d DEX volume, moving nearly 10% of all onchain DEX volume.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/7818b5e5-eb37-4b5d-80fd-bf1ef047a86e/7d-dex-volume-by-chain-robinhood-chain-vs-peers_2026-07-13.png?t=1783960489)
Caption: 

While the capital base is still small compared to competitors, Robinhood Chain is punching well above its weight in DEX activity and has the highest DEX volume-to-TVL ratio compared to competitors.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/4195d56a-3ee5-461c-b89c-f775f849a9b7/7-day-dex-volume-to-tvl-ratio-robinhood-chain-vs-top-chains_2026-07-13.png?t=1783960752)
Caption: 

## Uniswap earns massive fees after launch

Uniswap is currently facilitating over 99% of Robinhood Chain’s DEX volume. Nearly $4b in volume has exchanged hands through Uniswap just over the last seven days, and [total Uniswap DEX volume is up 71% WoW](https://defillama.com/protocol/dexs/uniswap).

Robinhood Chain’s $3b in activity is responsible for 25% of Uniswap’s 7d DEX volume and ranks 2nd only to Ethereum, which produced $4.7b.

H
